caption:
It takes 66 days to rewrite your habits. 

You're not gonna magically wake up disciplined one day. Your brain is wired to resist change, so you need to put in the work for 66 days to see real results.

Follow for unfiltered discipline.

#buildcharacter #growthmindsetdaily #buildinghabits #wisdommotivation #buildmentaltoughness #workethicmatters #disciplineequalsfreedom #disciplinefuel #disciplinedaily
